files.content_summary: System Maintenance Log — July 23, 2026 12:01 CET. Cycle: hourly-system-maintenance. Fixed index.html broken meta tag, mobile_dashboard.html stale timestamp, heartbeat-state.json outdated, HEARTBEAT.md stale timestamp. DETECT → ANALYZE → SOLVE → VERIFY → DOCUMENT loop applied.

Daily Research Engine v2.0 — INTEGRATED (11:33 CET). Status: Live APIs integrated into daily research automation. APIs: CoinGecko, Etherscan, Lido, EigenLayer. Automation ready for cron job eth-morning-brief at 07:30 CET.

Ethereum Authority Mission — DEPLOYED (11:02 CET). Location: investment/ethereum_authority/. Status: Research infrastructure active. Thesis: Ethereum as dominant institutional-grade digital asset. Encyclopedia with 4 volumes covering Institutional, Ecosystem, Markets, Narratives.
Heartbeat state tracking JSON. Contains lastChecks for weather, email, calendar, autonomyMorning, heartbeat, wsl, marketData. Notes on WSL install status, calendar check, market data from Jul 19.

Live market data with BTC $65,589.69 (-0.79%), ETH $1,922.47 (-0.61%), NVDA $212.06 (+2.30%), TSLA $374.01 (-1.30%), MSTR $100.01 (-1.90%), AAPL $325.89 (-0.56%), HIMS $31.68 (-3.21%), COIN $166.12 (-5.53%). Sources: twelvedata with failures on SPY, QQQ, GLD, TLT due to rate limits.

MARKET DATA SERVICE - Multi-Source Resilient Price Fetcher. Always returns fresh prices via cascading fallbacks. Sources: Twelve Data → CoinGecko → Yahoo Finance → Cached. 12 tickers across 3 tiers. Async with retry logic.

Prime Directive — Recursive Self-Improvement (July 17, 2026). Core identity file. Level 1: CLAW Meta-Improvement. Level 2: Every Mission & Task. 5-attempt minimum autonomous problem-solving loop. DETECT → ANALYZE → SOLVE → VERIFY → DOCUMENT.

Workspace home file. Contains first run instructions, session startup guidance, memory file conventions (daily notes, long-term), red lines, external vs internal safe actions, group chat guidelines, tools reference.

Administrator Setup Required for Full Automation. Windows Security blockers for Visual Studio Build Tools, Chrome CDP port binding, Windows Service. Workarounds available: semi-automated mode works. Option 1: Run elevated task as Admin. Option 2: Manual Chrome shortcut. Option 3: Semi-automated posting.

X account automation config for @quentinvest1. Target followers: 10,000, current: 212. Posting times: 08:00, 12:00, 16:00. Engagement times: 09:00, 13:00, 19:00. Threads ready: hims, ai_commerce. Tier 1 targets: TheLongInvestor, DrTomsLens, DylanLeClair_, RaoulGMI.
Cron jobs for X automation system. Timezone: Europe/Paris. Jobs: morning_digest (8am), engagement_check (9am, 1pm, 7pm), metrics_daily (10pm), weekly_report (Monday 9am). Targets Telegram channel.

X Automation System Dashboard - Full Autonomous Implementation. 8 active jobs: content-generator (7am), daily-posting-briefing (8am), trend monitoring 3x daily, analytics-tracker, engagement-check, weekly-report. Daily workflow: 30 seconds to copy content and post.

Full autonomy cron jobs. 8 jobs: autonomy-morning-briefing (7am), gmail-morning-check (7am), outlook-morning-check (7:05am), calendar-morning-check (7:10am), ai-services-research (9am), autonomy-midday-check (12pm), autonomy-afternoon-check (3pm), autonomy-evening-summary (6pm).

Full PC & Account Autonomy Plan - Complete automation of Quentin's digital life. Scope expansion: PC file management, Email (Gmail, Outlook), Calendar, Web browsing, AI services (Gemini, Grok), Financial accounts (viewing only). Phased approach: Browser automation foundation, Email integration, Calendar integration, AI services, Advanced PC control.

Three-tier efficiency system for research, coding, and execution. Brain tier: deepseek-v4-pro for complex research. Coding tier: kimi-k2.7-code for development. Muscles tier: kimi-k2.5 for quick tasks. Auto-route enabled with fallback chain.

X Browser Automation Setup Guide. Chrome with X login ready. OpenClaw browser tool requires credentials configuration. Two options: Configure browser credentials (recommended) or Hybrid approach - generate content, send via Telegram, user copy/pastes to X. Recommendation: Hybrid approach for immediate results.

Buffer API poster for X posting. Node.js script using GraphQL API to create posts. Functions: bufferRequest, createPost, getProfiles. Requires BUFFER_API_KEY and BUFFER_PROFILE_ID environment variables. Not yet configured with actual credentials.

Autonomous Research & Build Report. Cycle 1 of continuous improvement. Building: WSL installation, Research Dashboard, Auto-Improvement Loop. Built: enhanced_content_system_v2.py with research-backed content strategy, thread generation, engagement optimization.

Content templates for X posting. Categories: eth_treasury (btc_comparison, institutional_adoption, strategy_sale, microstrategy_evolution), hims_healthcare (infrastructure_play, picks_shovels, revenue_growth, business_model), ai_agentic_commerce (mckinsey_thesis, portfolio_angle, infrastructure, timeline), engagement_hooks (question_flip, data_first, conviction_close).

PowerShell script to organize 03-DOCUMENTS folder in OneDrive. Categorizes files by name patterns: EPS documents (sports education), Administrative (contracts, certificates), Formations (training, certifications). Moves files to appropriate subfolders.

Python script using Playwright to launch Chrome with user's actual profile. Navigates to grok.com. Uses C:/Users/quent/AppData/Local/Google/Chrome/User Data as profile path. Launches in headed mode for authentication check.

CLAW IMPROVEMENT MISSION — Daily Recursive Self-Optimization. Mission ID: claw-improvement-daily. Frequency: Every day at 06:00 CET. Scope: Level 1 (Claw meta-improvement) + Level 2 (mission learning). Daily cycle: System Health check, Mission Review, Claw Self-Analysis, Forward Planning. After-Action Review template included.

Conversation Summary - X Growth Mission. Key decisions: Channel setup (DM = Command center, Telegram = Coordination), X Account @quentinvest1 targeting 10K followers, Token optimization via conversation summarization and cached templates. Current status: Threads Posted 1 (ETH Treasury), Threads Ready 2 (HIMS, AI Commerce).

Daily Posting Briefing - Auto-generated. Account: @quentinvest1, 213 followers. Today's post: ETH Treasury follow-up. Copy/paste ready content with hashtags. Reply targets: TheLongInvestor, DrTomsLens, DylanLeClair_. Schedule includes threads Mon-Wed, singles Thu-Sun.

Mission Control Dashboard - Phone Access Guide. Local URLs at http://192.168.1.69:8080 for main dashboard, predictive, analytics. HTTP server runs on Windows startup. Phone setup: connect to same WiFi, bookmark URLs. Features: responsive design, real-time updates, dark mode. Troubleshooting for connection issues.

Dashboard Improvement Log - Evolution from v1.0 to v10.0. Current: Risk Management Dashboard operational. Major versions: v2.0 responsive HTML/CSS, v3.0 predictive scoring, v4.0 unified command center, v5.0 live engagement, v9.9 portfolio rebalancing, v10.0 risk management. Features: real-time VaR, drawdown tracking, position sizing, correlation matrix, push notifications.

Engagement Strategy for @quentinvest1. Strategic reply targets: Tier 1 (TheLongInvest, DrTomsLens, DylanLeClair_, RaoulGMI), Tier 2 (DocumentingBTC, SGJohnsson, ercwl, sassal0x), Tier 3 (emerging accounts). Reply templates for ETH Treasury, HIMS Healthcare, AI Agentic Commerce angles. Daily rhythm: strategic replies 8-10am, 12-2pm, 4-6pm.

Enhanced X Automation System - Complete Setup. 3x daily trend monitoring (9am, 1pm, 7pm). Content diversification: Single Posts 35%, Threads 20%, Carousels 15%, Polls 10%, Quote Posts 15%. Thread schedule: Mon-Wed only. 8 active cron jobs including content generation, daily briefing, trend checks, analytics, weekly report.

External Dashboard Access Guide - Access Mission Control from Anywhere. Methods: Cloudflare Tunnel (recommended), ngrok (easiest but temporary), LocalTunnel (open source). Security considerations: add authentication, use HTTPS, limit access, monitor logs. Cloudflare quick tunnel command: cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8080.

Full Autonomy System - DEPLOYED July 10, 2026. 7 systems operational: X Growth Automation (8 cron jobs), YouTube Automation (25 channels), Email Automation (Gmail/Outlook), Calendar Automation, AI Services (Gemini/Grok), PC Control, OneDrive Organization. Complete daily schedule from 7am to 9pm. 16 total cron jobs active. Daily user time: ~5 minutes.

Claw identity: Autonomous AI agent embedded on Windows PC. Vibe: calm, competent, efficient. No fluff. Social media posting allowed for high-signal analytical content. Strict financial/spending ban without explicit consent per transaction. Log all actions.

Enhanced Full Research v2.0. Combines enhanced prices, enhanced TA, enhanced sentiment. Features: better caching, parallel execution, accuracy improvements. Parallel analyses: market data, technical analysis, sentiment. Calculates enhanced composite score with weights.

Enhanced Market Data Service v2.0. WebSocket support, parallel fetching, better error handling. Sources: Twelve Data (primary) → CoinGecko → Yahoo Finance → Cached. Real-time streaming, multiple timeframe analysis. Extended asset mapping: BTC, ETH, MSTR, HIMS.
